plot outline: A remake of the 1985 original, teenager Charley Brewster (Yelchin) guesses that his new neighbor Jerry Dandrige (Farrell) is a vampire responsible for a string of recent deaths. When no one he knows believes him, he enlists Peter Vincent (Tennant), a self proclaimed vampire killer and Las Vegas magician, to help him take down Jerry.
title: Fright Night
akas: Noche de miedo (Fright Night) (Spain, Castilian title)

distributors.name: Walt Disney Studios Motion Pictures Argentina
